title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Greek Key Hand Towels Set of 4 – 500 GSM Super Fast Absorbent Lightweight Quick Dry Bathroom Towels, Soft 100% Egyptian Cotton Towel for Bathroom, Spa & Gym, 50x80 cm, Natural
features: EGYPTIAN COTTON MATERIAL: Crafted from premium Egyptian cotton, known for its exceptional softness and durability. Experience a plush feel that enhances your daily bathing routine with unparalleled comfort.

GREEK PATTERN DESIGN: Adorned with a sophisticated Greek pattern, these towels elevate your bathroom decor with a timeless aesthetic. The intricate design adds a touch of classical elegance, blending seamlessly into any modern or traditional bathroom setting.
TOWEL SET: Each set includes four hand towels, generously sized to provide ample coverage and functionality. Whether drying hands or face, these towels offer convenience and luxury in every use.

HIGHLY ABSORBENT QUICK DRY: these towels quickly thread moisture away to keep you dry and comfortable. Their quick-drying properties ensure they remain fresh and ready for use after each wash, ideal for busy households or frequent use.

EASY CARE: these towels are machine washable, making cleaning effortless and convenient. Maintain their plush texture and vibrant color with simple care instructions, ensuring they retain their beauty and functionality over time.
